caption: Figure 4.6. Input Biomass Fuel for Each Type of Biomass Power Generation
description: A stacked bar chart showing the percentage distribution of different biomass fuel types (Domestic logs, pellets, PKS, etc.) across various power generation categories like Unutilised wood and General wood.

caption: Figure 4.7. Wood Pellets Import
description: A stacked bar chart illustrating the significant increase in wood pellet imports to Japan from 2014 to 2019, categorized by country of origin including Viet Nam and Canada.
